sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I can see the player is now to the left of the bottom blue square. The player is facing RIGHT (white bar on the left). Let me check the exact position and try to shoot at the bottom frame.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'W', 'b', 'c']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check ascii around player
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nPlayer region (rows 33-42, cols 24-40):")
for i in range(33, 42):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][24:42]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:
Now I see:
- Player (N): rows 36-39, cols 29-31
- W bar: rows 36-39, cols 24-28 (on the LEFT side, so facing RIGHT)
- Bottom frame (c): rows 36-39, cols 32-35
- Bottom blue square (b): rows 37-38, cols 33-34
The player is at cols 29-31 and the frame is at cols 32-35. The player is directly to the LEFT of the frame, and they're on the same rows (36-39). The player is facing RIGHT (toward the frame). This is the perfect position to shoot!
Let me press SPACE to shoot at the bottom frame.

# Bottom frame at rows 36-39, cols 32-35 (directly to the right)
# Perfect position to shoot! Press SPACE.
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
